title: Data visualization : Canadian Integrated Program for Antimicrobial Resistance Surveillance (CIPARS) - Canada.ca
content:
## Canadian Integrated Program for Antimicrobial Resistance Surveillance (CIPARS): Data visualization
- Surveillance reports
CIPARS's  surveillance activities generate a vast amount of rich data about:
- antimicrobial       resistance (AMR) in select foodborne bacteria
- antimicrobial       sales and farm-level antimicrobial use
To help users explore and understand these data,  CIPARS created interactive visualizations that are customizable. These  visualizations include:
- summaries       about CIPARS
- key and       integrated findings (with several tabs describing integrated surveillance       stories)
- animal       antimicrobial sales and use information
- AMR from       different stages along the food chain
Access CIPARS data visualizations
